title.emphasis: Part 3: Patron Safety in Personal Care & Health Services

listitem.para: Sections 7313, 7351, 7362, 7403.5, 7404 (Business and Professions Code). Health and Safety in Barbering and Cosmetology Establishments: Provides for inspections, allows for the immediate closure of establishments that pose a threat to patron health and safety, and requires amenities like public restrooms for patrons.

Section 123471 (Health and Safety Code). Patrons of Family Planning & Pregnancy-Related Facilities: Defines licensed and unlicensed covered facilities in part by whether they advertise or solicit patrons with offers of pregnancy-related services.
